meta.source: Figma 'Living Room' page (Emerald Residence 107), frame 0:2, scale 1px = 1cm — updated layout pulled 2026-07-17
meta.coords: x = Figma x, z = Figma y (plan view), y = up. All footprints are [x, z] of top-left corner in plan + [width, depth].
meta.assumed: Ceiling 240 confirmed by photo measurement (door-to-wall pixel ratio; ±5). Window sill 90 / height 120 assumed; balcony door is full-height glass (opening to 210). Billy+Hogadal 160x30x149 user-confirmed. TV stand uses label dims 188x39 (Figma drew 180x39). Bookshelf h ~155 from photos; shoe rack is STALL, h 148. Balcony door assigned to the NORTH west-wall opening (sofa chaise blocks the southern one) — unconfirmed.
meta.details: Materials/decor for prompts live in furniture-notes.md

walls.name: kitchen-west-stub
walls.note: connects TV wall to kitchen back wall

openings.name: balcony-door
openings.note: full-height glass balcony door, charcoal aluminum frame

furniture.name: swivel-chair
furniture.note: West Elm Cozy swivel chair, charcoal melange fabric. NW corner by TV wall; backrest toward the corner (NW), open front facing SE into the room.

furniture.name: tv-stand
furniture.note: oak top/frame, white drawer fronts, open middle shelf; body raised on short tapered legs so the depth map shows the under-gap (first run misread a solid box as a sideboard)

furniture.name: tv-samsung-frame
furniture.note: Samsung Frame TV, white bezel, mounted flush on north wall above TV stand

furniture.name: billy-hogadal-shelving
furniture.note: 2x BILLY/HOGADAL white bookcases with woven bamboo doors on 2x BILLY rolling drawers; total h user-confirmed

furniture.name: water-cooler
furniture.note: Panasonic bottom-load dispenser, black + stainless; h approx

furniture.name: dining-table
furniture.note: West Elm Modern Expandable, unexpanded; white lacquer top, pecan legs. Tabletop slab on 4 leg posts — solid box read as kitchen island 5/5 in first run

furniture.name: sonderod-rug
furniture.note: IKEA SONDEROD high-pile rug, blue, 240x170; sofa sits on it, centered to the media console (x center 687)

furniture.name: coffee-table
furniture.note: IKEA GUTTANE coffee table, solid oak, long/narrow/low; in front of sofa, centered to the media console

furniture.name: applaryd-sofa
furniture.note: L-shape, faces north (toward TV wall). Chaise on WEST end. Outline from Figma: main body x 494-816, z 609-702 (322x93); chaise x 494-585, z 540-702 (91x162). Heights: seat 47, back cushions to 82, arms ~65. Build as seat blocks + backrest slab along south edge + arm bolsters on both ends + chaise seat extension.

furniture.name: bookshelf
furniture.note: pine open bookcase, 2x4 cubbies, dark back panels; against south wall next to sofa; h from photos

furniture.name: shoe-rack
furniture.note: IKEA STALL white shoe cabinet, 3 flip-down compartments

camera.name: couch-view
camera.note: seated on the sofa main seat, looking north at the TV wall
